Our incredible Make £5 Grow entrepreneurs have been busy selling their handmade goods to the public. Over 200,000 pupils have taken part in the programme. They take £5 and use it to start their own business, all while developing their skills and confidence. Jasmin Sanghera, our Community Manager, interviewed our latest participants to hear about their business and what they’ve enjoyed most about the programme. Take a look 👆 #entrepreneur #business #make5grow #virginmoney

aweme_list.desc: If you're part of the 2.5 million UK households struggling to afford internet, we're here for you.  We've extended our collaboration with @Good Things Foundation to provide free mobile SIM cards to those facing digital exclusion. All you need to do is visit any of our Virgin Money Stores, which are all part of the National Databank. Look at how to access the service now ☝️ UK, 18+. Subject to acceptance.  #Data #GoodThingsFoundation #fyp #VirginMoney #simcard

Our digital how-to guides breakdown how to use our mobile banking app step by step. From registering in the app, managing your money, making payments and more. Give them a try today via the link in our bio. #VirginMoney #MobileBanking #DigitalDemo #Banking
@Virgin Money UK if any of my posts go Vrial I hope it’s this one!!! #virginmoney  #creditcard  #viral

🔊 Sound on. We’re supporting @BBC’s #BeScamSafe Week as a scam can happen to anyone, even you.  Fraudsters will try to confuse you, create a time pressure and even pretend to be from your bank. That’s exactly what happened to one of our customers. Take a listen to the real audio recording of their call with one of our brilliant colleagues from our Fraud team. Always remember to stop, think, check. Find out more about fraud, scams and how to keep your money safe via the link in our bio. #virginmoney #fraud #scam #shopsafe #stopthinkcheck
